/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/srv/detail/change_face_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/tof_sensor_data__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/detected_person_frame_offset__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/imu_data__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/detected_voice_command__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/move_robot_command__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/custom_navigation_goal__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/srv/detail/set_custom_navigation_goal__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
